Strip_Summary: First-person view: stethoscope placed on patient chest, bright clinical exam room
Bold white text on dark grey background: 'Unremarkable.'
Doctor stickman in exam room. Morning patient exits smiling vs current figure seated silent
Bold text on dark background: 'Same equipment. Different purpose.'
Doctor stickman looking at own hands. Two doorways behind - one bright one dark
Doctor stickman in corridor between training certificates. Lab coat and stethoscope. That's the problem
Doctor stickman at exam desk with clock. Compatibility forms and lab equipment
Bold white text on dark background: 'You are good at your job.'
Doctor stickman at desk with diploma and stack of bills. Modest apartment
Doctor stickman reviewing paycheck at desk. Debt growing, interest unpaid
Doctor stickman alone in hospital cafeteria eating cheap lunch
Doctor stickman walking hospital corridor. Good at medicine but debt remains
Doctor stickman holding office phone. Shadow figure on other end. Evening light
Phone conversation detail. Medical terms: blood compatibility, tissue typing
Doctor stickman listening on phone. Notepad with instructions and arrangement
Doctor stickman still on phone. Private arrangement described professionally
Doctor stickman hearing money amount. Notepad showing more than monthly salary
Doctor stickman at desk. Phone down. Hand writing address. Tense expression. Cool blue wash
First-person entering back office. Metal gate behind, narrow alley visible outside
Dim exam room interior. Yellow humming light. Old but functional equipment
Medical equipment on tray: stethoscope, blood cuff, sample tubes. Sharps container overfull
Bold text on dark background: 'Just not yours.'
Thin donor stickman (dot eyes, fearful mouth) seated on chair. Doctor standing opposite. Dread grey vignette
Doctor stickman placing stethoscope on donor chest. Shoes untied. Hand unsteady
Doctor stickman checking blood pressure twice. Listening to heart twice
Doctor stickman pausing after readings. Hands already knew the answer
Doctor stickman signing blank form at desk. No letterhead, just handwriting
Close view of pen in doctor's hand. Pen heavy. Single light overhead
Doctor stickman driving car at night, radio off. Past hospital and gas station
Streetlights passing through windshield one at a time. Doctor counting three
Doctor stickman in parked car. Opening envelope from glove compartment
Bold text on dark background: 'One exam. One form. One signature.'
Doctor stickman at home. Telling self it was just a blood test, just numbers
Doctor stickman staring at wall. This test went to a different address
Doctor stickman at bathroom sink washing hands third time. Faucet running
Doctor stickman looking at own hands under bathroom light. Hands smell different. Warm amber edges
Bright legitimate clinic morning. Doctor examining patient (faceless) on table
Doctor stickman writing 'within range.' Patient (faceless) smiling, saying thank you
Doctor stickman nodding at patient. Morning routine. Everything feels normal
Doctor stickman in corridor thinking. From outside this morning looks like training
Evening. Back office behind pharmacy. Donor (faceless) on different table
Doctor stickman listening to donor's heart. Same way. Writing 'within range.'
Same pen, same handwriting, same words. Donor doesn't smile, doesn't speak
Split: left 'MORNING' patient saying thank you vs right 'EVENING' donor silent. Same doctor posture
Doctor stickman placing stethoscope quickly. One check, not two. Efficient motion
Doctor stickman with stethoscope. Ears hear same thing either way. Mechanical
Doctor stickman driving home at night. Morning patients and evening donors same list
Doctor stickman at wheel. Categories dissolving. System never had them
First-person: lab tray with sample tubes. False name written on middle tube
Lab rack: illegal tube sitting between routine cholesterol and thyroid check samples
Lab machine reading barcode. Machine reading numbers. No questions asked
Bold text transitioning shaky to steady: 'It used to shake. It doesn't.'
Doctor stickman facing donor (faceless) who looks directly at doctor. Donor asks question. Grey vignette
Doctor stickman answering with practiced calm. Same clinical tone as morning. Donor nods slowly
Doctor stickman in white coat. Sounds like a doctor because is one. Back office dim
Extreme close-up: pen hovering over checkbox. 'Suitable for procedure' visible on form
Bold text on dark background: 'Because you do.'
Doctor stickman looking at form. Understanding where it goes. Donor (faceless) across table
Doctor stickman checking box and signing. Next donor two weeks later, no hesitation
Sequence of donors (faceless) arriving. Intervals shortening. Forms accumulating on desk
Doctor stickman adjusting stethoscope. Looking up at water stain on ceiling tile above chair
Doctor stickman thinking about ceiling stain. Doesn't know who owns building
Doctor stickman in anonymous space. No address known. No real names. Used to bother him
First-person: small blood tube held up to light. Noticeably less blood. Light passing through
Doctor stickman holding tube up to light. Blood barely covering line. Desaturated grey
Doctor stickman looking at small tube. Whoever this came from had little to give
Doctor stickman not asking why. Already knows. Dark lab, single desk lamp
Doctor stickman labeling tube with false name. Running test. Small volume visible in tube
Doctor stickman chest tightening. Not guilt. Recognition. Results on desk. Grey vignette
Bold text on dark background: 'Healthy. Viable. Compatible.'
Doctor stickman on phone with broker shadow. Lab results on desk. Kidney function numbers
Doctor stickman refusing. Form unsigned. Saying 'not compatible.' Rigid, jaw tight. Grey vignette
Doctor stickman sitting alone. Phone on desk. Staring at wall. Nobody watching
Doctor stickman on phone. Broker different tone. Another doctor cleared the sample
Doctor stickman processing. Maybe other doctor didn't check volume. Refusal meaningless
Doctor stickman sitting still. It mattered that someone said yes. Grey vignette
Bold stacked text: 'It needs a signature. And there's always someone.'
Doctor stickman lying in bed. Donor went to surgeon. Sleep lost. Dark room
Doctor stickman answering phone on second ring. Skipping volume. Reading blood type
Doctor stickman reading kidney function, compatibility. Signing. No pause
Bold text: 'You've learned what you don't need to know.'
Doctor stickman reading form from middle. Name field at top ignored. Data fields only
Doctor stickman at desk. Everything broker needs. Name was never the point
Doctor stickman not sure when stopped looking at names. Form blurred at top
Morning shift: patient chest, stethoscope, clipboard, signature at bottom
Evening: donor chest, stethoscope, clipboard, signature at bottom. Identical sequence
Bold text on dark background: 'Same stethoscope. Same clipboard. Same hand.'
Doctor stickman standing still in corridor. Willing has always been there. No line. Gold light fading
Doctor stickman standing. Maybe no line between diagnosing patients and evaluating donors
Medical equipment on desk. Stethoscope doesn't know. Lab doesn't know. Form doesn't know
Doctor stickman in loop: observe, translate, write, sign. Five-minute cycle
Doctor stickman writing. Everything blurs - names and forms. Then clears. Keeps writing
Bold text on dark background: 'Neither do you. Not anymore.'
Doctor stickman at dinner party. Someone (faceless) asking what he does. Glass in hand
Doctor stickman responding 'doctor.' They say good hospital. Nothing added or subtracted
Doctor stickman refilling glass. Changing subject. That's the whole answer. Neutral posture
Doctor stickman placing stethoscope. Left hand steadies. Right hand listens. Mirror of HOOK
Bold text: 'Unremarkable. No abnormalities detected.'
Doctor stickman stepping through doorway. Gloves, stethoscope, clipboard. Ambiguous room
Doctor stickman in room. Doesn't check which one. Exam is the same
Bold text on dark background: 'It was always the same.'
